title: Amtech M1000 150mm (6") Junior Hacksaw with 6 Blades

description: From the manufacturer 6″ junior hacksaw – with 6 blades Chrome plated frame with finger guard Supplied with 6 blades Frame accepts all standard 6″ (150mm) blades (with fine tooth)
